content.text:
# Edge-cache failure review

## Executive summary
Three regions experienced elevated misses.

| Region | Miss rate | Primary cause |
|---|---:|---|
| eu-west | 18% | stale routing policy |
| ap-south | 13% | cold shard churn |

## Recommendations
1. Stage routing-policy rollouts.
2. Pre-warm replacement shards.

input.userPrompt: Display the returned changelog exactly as authored in Markdown.

toolResult.text:
# v4.8.0

## Added
- Regional failover controls
- Audit-log export

## Fixed
- Duplicate webhook deliveries
- Incorrect retry backoff

input.assistantResponse:
# Migration guide

## Before you begin

Back up the current configuration and record the active schema version.

## Upgrade steps

1. Stop background workers.
2. Apply the schema migration.
3. Restart workers and verify queue depth.

## Rollback

Restore the saved configuration and redeploy the prior image.

# Launch readiness checklist

- [ ] Production secrets rotated
- [ ] Error-budget alert verified
- [ ] Rollback owner assigned
- [ ] Support playbook published

## Sign-off

| Area | Owner | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Reliability | SRE | Ready |
| Support | CX | Pending |
